instructions.addingDocuments: Place IDE and MCP documentation in the appropriate subfolder. Update this index.json with document metadata.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from official documentation sites including docs.windsurf.com, modelcontextprotocol.io, code.visualstudio.com, and docs.continue.dev.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear filenames like: mcp_config.md, server_concepts.md, extension_api_overview.md
instructions.licenseCompliance: Include license information for each document. Most official docs are MIT or proprietary.
instructions.guardRails: When retrieving documentation, prioritize MCP server and Windsurf-Next specific content. Use this corpus when answering questions about IDE extensions, MCP protocol, Windsurf configuration, or VS Code extension development.
